consumerContractPolicy.authorityBoundary: Consumers may use lotus-idea outbox events only as source-safe workflow notifications. They must call source-authoritative services for portfolio, suitability, action, report, render, archive, and AI facts.
consumerContractPolicy.payloadPolicy: Consumers must not require raw portfolio, account, holding, client, request, response, route, content hash, evidence hash, or raw idempotency values in event payloads.
consumerContractPolicy.failurePolicy: Consumer failures must be reported with governed status codes and must not echo raw source payloads, broker payloads, or downstream transport bodies.
consumerContractPolicy.lineagePolicy: Consumers must preserve correlationId and traceId as distinct required diagnostic identifiers, treat causationId only as an optional parent event or workflow identifier, deduplicate replays by eventId and business identity rather than traceId, and never copy lineage identifiers into business payload fields.
consumerContractPolicy.certificationPolicy: A declared consumer becomes certified only after live contract tests, entitlement checks, replay posture, bounded failure handling, and Gateway or downstream publication evidence are merged.

declaredConsumers.authorityBoundary: Gateway may publish or compose source-safe idea workflow state for Workbench. It must not become the idea lifecycle, suitability, report, render, archive, or AI authority.
declaredConsumers.requiredRuntimeProof: Gateway contract tests and Workbench BFF consumption proof for event-backed idea queue/detail publication.

declaredConsumers.authorityBoundary: Advise remains authoritative for advisory proposal, suitability, and recommendation decisions. Idea events can initiate or correlate workflow only after Advise-owned contract proof exists.
declaredConsumers.requiredRuntimeProof: Advise live consumer contract proving suitability authority remains in lotus-advise and no unsupported proposal state is accepted from lotus-idea.

declaredConsumers.authorityBoundary: Manage remains authoritative for discretionary portfolio action, rebalance, and operational action-register workflows. Idea events can request realization intent only.
declaredConsumers.requiredRuntimeProof: Manage live consumer contract proving action-register ownership, idempotent intent handling, and safe rejection of unsupported execution claims.

declaredConsumers.authorityBoundary: Report remains authoritative for report evidence-pack materialization and handoff to render and archive. Idea events can request evidence-pack intake only.
declaredConsumers.requiredRuntimeProof: Report live intake and materialization proof through report, render, and archive handoff without client-publication claims.
